notes.auspices: Each auspice is tied to a moon phase and grants an Auspice Renown (marked at one dot at creation), a Hunter's Aspect, three Auspice Skills, and an auspice benefit. A character's auspice is fixed by the moon under which she had her First Change.
notes.tribes: Each tribe follows a Firstborn, grants a Tribal Renown (marked at one dot at creation), and offers three Shadow Gift affinities. Ghost Wolves are tribeless: no Firstborn, no Tribal Renown, no Gift affinities, and they begin play with one fewer Renown dot.
notes.renown: The five Renown are Cunning, Glory, Honor, Purity, and Wisdom. At creation a werewolf has three Renown dots (one auspice, one tribal, one free), but may not place a third dot in any single Renown at this stage. Ghost Wolves get two.
notes.forms: Every Uratha shifts between five forms, from fully human (Hishu) to fully wolf (Urhan). Form changes alter Attributes, Size, Health, Speed, Defense, and which Lunacy a werewolf inflicts.
notes.gifts: Gifts come in three kinds: Moon Gifts (one per auspice, facets bought in order and capped by auspice Renown), Shadow Gifts (granted by spirits; five facets, one per Renown), and Wolf Gifts (innate; always unlocked). A facet requires at least one dot in its associated Renown.
notes.rites: Rites are spiritual rituals divided into Wolf Rites (a lone werewolf may perform) and Pack Rites (require the whole pack). Rank is shown in dots (1-5). A character begins play with two dots of rites; one dot costs one Merit dot.
notes.accuracy: Gift, facet, and rite text is summarized for in-game listing. Consult Werewolf: The Forsaken 2e for full mechanical text, dice pools, and roll results before adjudicating an effect.

auspices.name: Cahalith
auspices.benefit: Prophetic Dreams. A Cahalith's sleep brings visions; the Storyteller may grant prophetic dreams, and following one grants a +3 modifier (or an automatic failure to be warned away) once per chapter.
auspices.description: The visionary and lore-keeper, sworn to Glory. The Cahalith is the pack's storyteller, prophet, and living memory, and her hunts are loud, memorable, and inevitable.

auspices.name: Elodoth
auspices.benefit: Darkness Into Light. The Elodoth is a born arbiter, mediating between flesh and spirit and rendering binding judgments between feuding parties.
auspices.description: The walker between worlds, sworn to Honor. The Elodoth judges disputes, brokers oaths, and stands at the border of the physical and the spiritual to keep the balance.

auspices.name: Irraka
auspices.benefit: Closer Than You Thought. Under cover of darkness the Irraka strikes from where the prey least expects, the unseen knife at the hunt's edge.
auspices.description: The stalker and trickster, sworn to Cunning. The Irraka scouts, infiltrates, and ambushes; the prey never knows she was there until it is far too late.

auspices.name: Ithaeur
auspices.benefit: Spirit Howl. The Ithaeur commands the respect of spirits, calling on the denizens of the Shadow and reading the symbolic truths buried in their hearts.
auspices.description: The spirit-master and shaman, sworn to Wisdom. The Ithaeur deals with the Hisil, binds and bargains with spirits, and tends the pack's relationship with the world unseen.

auspices.name: Rahu
auspices.benefit: Tenacious. Once engaged in battle the Rahu refuses to yield, shrugging off the penalties that would break a lesser hunter.
auspices.description: The warrior and war-leader, sworn to Purity. The Rahu is the tip of the pack's spear, the Full Moon's chosen, born to dominate and destroy the prey.

tribes.name: Blood Talons
tribes.ban: Honor the warrior's code: a Blood Talon exists for the kill and revels in the violent end of the hunt, refusing to let the People fall to weakness or wasted slaughter.
tribes.description: The Suthar Anzuth are warriors who live for the kill. They study the art of violence, hunt other Uratha gone astray, and keep their packs from falling into Kuruth.

tribes.name: Bone Shadows
tribes.ban: Pay the spirits their due: the Hirfathra Hissu take to heart Father Wolf's duty to shepherd the Hisil, and never leave a debt to the dead or the spirit-courts unpaid.
tribes.description: The Hirfathra Hissu are occultists and shepherds of the spirit world. They strike at the causes of imbalance between flesh and ephemera, and their hunt ranges into another world.

tribes.name: Hunters in Darkness
tribes.ban: Hold the territory: the Meninna watch the edges of their land, treat their territory as sacred as the darkness in which they wrap themselves, and let nothing trespass unchallenged.
tribes.description: The Meninna are guardians of place. They keep the boundaries of territory, ward the gates between worlds, and hunt anything that violates the land in their keeping.

tribes.name: Iron Masters
tribes.ban: Adapt and endure: the children of Sagrim-Ur are like water, flowing to fit the situation, and never cling to old ways when the hunt demands something new.
tribes.description: The Iron Masters hunt in the modern world, masters of the city, the machine, and the changing tide. Versatility is their greatest weapon and adaptation their creed.

tribes.name: Storm Lords
tribes.ban: Show no weakness: the Storm Lords endure where others would give in and roll over, and never let another witness their frailty or failure.
tribes.description: The Storm Lords are leaders and endurers. Their strength is in pushing on when all others would surrender, gathering in high places to test themselves against the storm.

tribes.name: Ghost Wolves
tribes.ban: No tribal oath binds the tribeless, but the Oath of the Moon still holds: a Ghost Wolf who would join a tribe must earn its Firstborn's favor.
tribes.description: The tribeless. Ghost Wolves swear to no Firstborn and claim no Tribal Renown. They are flexible and unbound, but begin play with one fewer Renown dot and only a single Shadow Gift.

renown.name: Cunning
renown.description: The Renown of cleverness, stealth, adaptation, and the unseen approach. Earned by outwitting the prey and surviving by guile.

renown.name: Glory
renown.description: The Renown of legend, courage, and inspiration. Earned by deeds worthy of the songs the Cahalith will sing of them.

renown.name: Honor
renown.description: The Renown of fairness, oaths, judgment, and self-command. Earned by keeping one's word and rendering true justice.

renown.name: Purity
renown.description: The Renown of conviction, tradition, and the sanctity of territory. Earned by holding the line and never wavering from the hunt.

renown.name: Wisdom
renown.description: The Renown of spirit-lore, balance, and insight. Earned by understanding the Hisil and keeping the scales of flesh and spirit level.

forms.name: Hishu
forms.label: Human
forms.description: The birth form, indistinguishable from a normal human. No combat bonuses, no Lunacy. The face the Uratha wears among people.

forms.name: Dalu
forms.label: Near-Human
forms.description: The unsettling wolf-man: taller, broader, and feral. +1 Strength, +1 Stamina, +1 Size, +2 to intimidating Presence. Inflicts mild Lunacy.

forms.name: Gauru
forms.label: War-Form
forms.description: The towering nine-foot killing machine. Massive Attribute boosts, lethal natural weapons, and regeneration. Inflicts full Lunacy and risks Death Rage; can be held only a few turns.

forms.name: Urshul
forms.label: Near-Wolf
forms.description: The dire-wolf: a monstrous wolf the size of a horse. Fast, powerful, and deadly, with bite and claw. Inflicts Lunacy.

forms.name: Urhan
forms.label: Wolf
forms.description: The true wolf form, indistinguishable from a large natural wolf. Swift, keen-scented, and able to pass unremarked among real wolves. No Lunacy.

facets.name: Shadow Gaze
facets.summary: Forces a spirit to spill its secrets, learning its ban and bane, and adds Wisdom to Empathy with spirits and the Ridden.

facets.name: Spirit Whispers
facets.summary: Stirs the sleeping spirit of a mundane object to answer a single short question about its immediate area.

facets.name: Shadow Hunter
facets.summary: On the Sacred Hunt, adds Wisdom to Perception, to resisting Numina and Dread Powers, and to chasing prey through the Shadow.

facets.name: Shadow Masquerade
facets.summary: Dons a spirit's Essence like a mask to pass among the denizens of the Shadow as one of their own.

facets.name: Panopticon
facets.cost: Essence equal to the spirit's max Rank
facets.summary: Leashes the denizens of the Shadow to serve as the Ithaeur's eyes and ears across her domain.

facets.name: Killer Instinct
facets.summary: Brings the Rahu's deadly instincts to the fore, granting 8-again on Brawl and Weaponry pools.

facets.name: Warrior's Hide
facets.summary: Adds Purity Renown to Health, gaining a point of Health with each increase of Purity.

facets.name: Bloody-Handed Hunter
facets.summary: A blood-spattered Rahu adds Purity to attacks against anyone obstructing the hunt.

facets.name: Butchery
facets.summary: Facing many foes, the Rahu paints the scene red, inflicting Tilts on his enemies.

facets.name: Crimson Spasm
facets.summary: The full lunacy of the Moon warps the Rahu's flesh into a primal engine of destruction.

facets.name: War Howl
facets.summary: Howls defiance to spur the pack to greater heights of violence and fury.

facets.name: Voice of Glory
facets.summary: The Cahalith's commanding voice holds audiences in thrall, adding Glory to Expression and Persuasion.

facets.name: Dream Hunter
facets.dicePool: Manipulation + Empathy + Glory vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Tracks sleeping prey through the moonlit dreamscape to come for them in their dreams.

facets.name: Thousand-Throat Howl
facets.dicePool: Presence + Intimidate + Glory vs Resolve + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Howls with a thousand voices, throwing the prey into confusion and disarray.

facets.name: End of Story
facets.dicePool: Presence + Persuasion + Glory vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Names the doomed prey and relates its impending fate, sealing the story's end.

facets.name: Scent Beneath the Surface
facets.dicePool: Wits + Empathy + Honor vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Threshes truth from lies, sensing whether a character's words and actions are deceptive.

facets.name: Binding Oath
facets.dicePool: Resolve + Persuasion + Honor vs Resolve + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Binds two consenting parties to a sworn oath, enforced with Essence.

facets.name: Sly Hunter
facets.summary: Hunts with a net of connections and favors, adding Honor to social pools used to ensnare prey.

facets.name: Ties of Word and Promise
facets.summary: Draws on the Elodoth's web of promises to temporarily gain a social Merit.

facets.name: Ties of Blood and Bone
facets.dicePool: Stamina + Empathy + Honor vs Stamina + Primal Urge
facets.summary: The Elodoth and a chosen packmate exchange places in a shiver of fleshy metamorphosis.

facets.name: Eviscerate
facets.summary: Turns an attack against an unaware or surprised opponent into a rote action.

facets.name: Slip Away
facets.summary: Leaves no memory of her passing, making the Irraka extremely hard to recall.

facets.name: Relentless Hunter
facets.summary: However well the prey hides, the Irraka adds Cunning to the pools used to pursue them.

facets.name: Divide and Conquer
facets.dicePool: Manipulation + Subterfuge + Cunning vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Pulls strong, numerous prey apart with lures and distractions to pick them off one by one.

facets.name: Breach
facets.summary: Slips across the Gauntlet like a shadow between worlds, with no need of a locus.

facets.name: Cold Embrace
facets.summary: Stills the heart and chills the flesh so the Uratha appears dead.

facets.name: Bone Gnaw
facets.summary: Gnawing human or werewolf bone yields knowledge of the dead or a temporary dot in their highest Skill or Renown.

facets.name: Eyes of the Dead
facets.summary: Reads the last moments of life reflected in the eyes of any remains that still have eyes.

facets.name: Primal Allure
facets.dicePool: Manipulation + Subterfuge + Cunning vs Resolve + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Predatory magnetism beguiles prey into following the Uratha's immediate desires.

facets.name: Glorious Lunacy
facets.summary: Radiating Luna's might, inflicts the Awestruck Condition on all prey instead of another Lunacy Condition.

facets.name: Lay Low the Challenger
facets.dicePool: Presence + Intimidate + Honor vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: On a damaging Brawl or Weaponry hit, establishes dominance through blood and violence.

facets.name: Snarl of the Predator
facets.summary: A snarled demand reduces the penalty for remaining Doors in a Social maneuver by Purity.

facets.name: Lead the Lesser Pack
facets.summary: Brings a willing outsider into the fold of the hunt as a packmate for one day.

facets.name: Breath of Air
facets.summary: Grants Influence (Air) equal to Cunning to command the howling, dancing winds.

facets.name: Catastrophe
facets.cost: 5 Essence per level of Influence used
facets.summary: Augments another Elemental facet to call down cataclysmic destruction over a vast area.

facets.name: Flesh of Earth
facets.summary: Grants Influence (Earth) equal to Honor as rock and ground become extensions of the will.

facets.name: Tongue of Flame
facets.summary: Grants Influence (Fire) equal to Purity as a fire-walker to whom the blaze bows.

facets.name: Heart of Water
facets.summary: Grants Influence (Water) equal to Wisdom to make water surge, strengthen, or recede.

facets.name: Feet of Mist
facets.summary: Erases all trace of passing, foiling every attempt to track or locate the Uratha.

facets.name: Fog of War
facets.dicePool: Wits + Subterfuge + Glory vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Amid chaos, causes a specific delivery — a bullet or package — to reach the wrong target.

facets.name: Deny Everything
facets.summary: Elevates evasiveness to an art, adding Honor to a single roll to resist a Social maneuver or Manipulation-based action.

facets.name: Hit and Run
facets.dicePool: Dexterity + Stealth + Purity vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Interrupts an attack to disengage and move full Speed away, leaving prey in confusion.

facets.name: Exit Strategy
facets.summary: Instantly maps every viable escape route and bolthole, and which apparent routes are false.

facets.name: Prey on Weakness
facets.dicePool: Presence + Empathy + Cunning vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Reveals an observed target's frailties, Conditions, and emotional state for a +3 social bonus.

facets.name: Read the World's Loom
facets.summary: Gleans insight into a chosen topic — threats, the supernatural, violence, or weather nearby.

facets.name: Echo Dream
facets.summary: Touching an object or place, receives a symbolic vision of a potent past event lingering there.

facets.name: Scent the Unnatural
facets.summary: Smells supernatural creatures and active powers within 10 yards per dot of Purity.

facets.name: One Step Ahead
facets.summary: Perceiving the prey or its location, gains insight into its likely next moves in the hunt.

facets.name: Lunatic Inspiration
facets.summary: Infects a human or Wolf-Blooded with Moon-granted inspiration, driving them to create art that may carry Luna's message.

facets.name: Fearless Hunter
facets.summary: Adds Glory to pools and to resisting fear and mind-influence; packmates who see her succeed resist too.

facets.name: Pack Triumphs Together
facets.summary: On Initiative, packmates raise their roll to the pack's highest, or gain 8-again on teamwork outside combat.

facets.name: Unity
facets.summary: During a Social maneuver against a packmate, adds Purity to the Doors the prey must break through.

facets.name: Still Small Voice
facets.dicePool: Presence + Persuasion + Wisdom vs Resolve + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Calming words drag any Wasu-Im who can hear her out of Death Rage and back to themselves.

facets.name: Needle
facets.dicePool: Manipulation + Subterfuge + Cunning vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Causes the prey to lose a copy of targeted information and penalizes all attempts to rediscover it.

facets.name: This Story Is True
facets.summary: A fitting story grants the Uratha or a packmate temporary dots in a single low-rated Skill.

facets.name: Know Thy Prey
facets.summary: Reveals every name the prey is known by, plus Alternate Identity, Fame, and social Merits.

facets.name: Lore of the Land
facets.summary: Reveals rites, resonance, and widespread effects on the territory, and nearby threats within the pack's land.

facets.name: Sift the Sands
facets.summary: Sets spirits to find sought knowledge in a store of data and deliver it past any lock or encryption.

facets.name: Nature's Lure
facets.dicePool: Manipulation + Survival + Cunning vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Draws an isolated person or small group at the edge of wilderness into its clutches, inflicting the Lured Condition.

facets.name: Black Earth, Red Hunger
facets.summary: A few drops of blood erupt rampant vegetation across an area, consuming corpses and granting free regeneration when blood is spilled there.

facets.name: Knotted Paths
facets.dicePool: Wits + Survival + Honor vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Traps perceived prey within an area of wilderness so every path they flee down only leads back.

facets.name: Pack Kin
facets.summary: Brings a tolerant predatory animal into the pack as a full and loyal packmate.

facets.name: Beast Ride
facets.dicePool: Wits + Animal Ken + Wisdom − animal's Resolve
facets.summary: Rides the mind and senses of a single mammal, fish, bird, or reptile while the Uratha's body sleeps.

facets.name: Incite Fury
facets.dicePool: Manipulation + Subterfuge + Cunning vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: A supernaturally stinging snarl goads a target into Wasu-Im or the Berserk Condition.

facets.name: Berserker's Might
facets.summary: Once per turn in Dalu, Gauru, or Urshul, reduces damage by Glory or heals one physical Tilt.

facets.name: Perfected Rage
facets.summary: On entering Gauru, adds Honor to the number of turns the form can be maintained.

facets.name: Slaughterer
facets.summary: On a Brawl hit in Gauru, adds Purity to the damage inflicted.

facets.name: Raging Lunacy
facets.summary: On entering a Lunacy-inflicting form, inflicts the Berserk Condition instead of another Lunacy Condition.

facets.name: Moldywarp
facets.summary: In Dalu, the hands become burrowing claws, granting tunneling Speed equal to Strength + Cunning.

facets.name: Shield-Breaker
facets.summary: On a Brawl or Weaponry hit, grants the attack armor-piercing equal to Glory.

facets.name: Entropy's Toll
facets.summary: An audible howl of entropy deals two Structure damage per success, ignoring Durability.

facets.name: Perfection of Form
facets.summary: Hones a held tool, raising its equipment bonus by successes the next time it is used.

facets.name: Sculpt
facets.summary: Makes a touched object up to Wisdom in Size malleable as clay, to be twisted and reshaped.

facets.name: Shadow Pelt
facets.summary: The shadows mask the hunter, treating Cunning-many Stealth rolls as rote actions.

facets.name: Predator's Shadow
facets.dicePool: Presence + Intimidation + Glory vs Composure + Primal Urge
facets.summary: Instills dread, inflicting the Shadow Paranoia Condition on outrolled prey.

facets.name: Pack Stalks the Prey
facets.summary: When the Uratha succeeds at Stealth but a packmate fails, the packmate succeeds instead.

facets.name: The Hunter Waits
facets.summary: While still and hidden, penalizes rolls to spot him by Purity and adds Purity to Initiative on a surprise attack.

facets.name: Running Silent
facets.summary: Reduces falling damage and terrain penalties by Wisdom and allows Stealth even at full speed.

facets.name: Unchained
facets.summary: Tears free of any binding regardless of material and adds Cunning to grappling rolls.

facets.name: Predator's Unmatched Pursuit
facets.summary: Multiplies jump distance by 1 + Glory, adds Glory to base Speed, and lets her double Speed for a turn.

facets.name: Crushing Blow
facets.summary: On a Brawl hit, penalizes the prey's Defense by Honor against the next attack from her or a packmate.

facets.name: Primal Strength
facets.summary: Adds Purity Renown to Strength for the duration.

facets.name: Rending Claws
facets.summary: In Gauru or Urshul, ignores Wisdom-many Durability and deals extra Structure damage equal to Wisdom.

facets.name: Garble
facets.summary: Turns a target's technology against them so it hinders rather than helps.

facets.name: Unmake
facets.dicePool: Wits + Crafts + Glory vs Resolve + Primal Urge
facets.summary: A snarled command condemns a device with moving parts (Size up to 5 × Glory) to disassemble itself.

facets.name: Command Artifice
facets.summary: A whispered, Essence-laced command makes a single device obey a one-sentence order.

facets.name: Shutdown
facets.summary: All lights, cameras, security, and phones in the area go dark, denying the prey technological sanctuary.

facets.name: Iron Slave
facets.summary: Immerses the senses into a vehicle or large machine, perceiving through it and taking control.

facets.name: Maze Ward
facets.summary: Twists the geometry of a place so intruders are penalized by Cunning and end up back at the edge.

facets.name: Ward the Wolf's Den
facets.summary: Penalizes crossings of the Gauntlet and portals by Glory; the Uratha can force a Clash of Wills to close breaches.

facets.name: All Doors Locked
facets.summary: Senses and seals or opens every door, window, and entryway in a touched building or vehicle.

facets.name: Predator's Claim
facets.summary: Marks an area with Essence, raising the Uratha's honorary Spirit Rank by +2 for attacking spirits within it.

facets.name: Boundary Ward
facets.summary: Designates a type of being and alerts the Uratha whenever such a being crosses into the warded area.

facets.name: Cloak of Mist and Haze
facets.summary: Howls up haze, mist, or sandstorm that penalizes Perception and ranged attacks by Cunning.

facets.name: Heavens Unleashed
facets.summary: Summons a thunderstorm whose rain and lightning penalize Speed and Initiative by Glory.

facets.name: Hunt Under Iron Skies
facets.summary: Reduces weather and environment penalties by Honor and ignores the Uratha's own Weather facets.

facets.name: Grasp of Howling Winds
facets.summary: A blast of Essence-laced wind penalizes a prey's Speed and Physical pools by Purity.

facets.name: Hunt of Fire and Ice
facets.summary: Subjects an area up to Wisdom miles across to the Extreme Cold or Extreme Heat Environmental Tilt.

facets.name: Skin Thief
facets.summary: In Hishu, skins a similar human or animal and dons the hide to become a perfect copy until shed.

facets.name: Gaze of the Moon
facets.summary: Subjects a human who sees his silver eyes to full Gauru-strength Lunacy, choosing the Condition.

facets.name: Luna's Embrace
facets.summary: Changes sex in a biologically complete way until used again, appearing as a twin of the old self.

facets.name: The Father's Form
facets.summary: Shifts to Gauru outside combat without Kuruth, ending if he attacks or takes more than Purity in lethal.

facets.name: Quicksilver Flesh
facets.summary: Shifts part of the current form to another shape's single benefit, such as Honed Senses or Razor Talons.

facets.name: Honed Senses
facets.summary: Achieves an exceptional success on Perception rolls with three successes instead of five.

facets.name: Cow the Prey
facets.summary: Spending Essence on the hunter's aspect makes its Condition Persistent; turning a hit into a dramatic failure grants the prey a Beat.

facets.name: Beast Talker
facets.summary: Communicates with and understands any known animal and may run Social maneuvers against it.

facets.name: Tireless Hunter
facets.summary: While on the hunt, ignores Purity-many penalties from fatigue and poor morale and Conditions blocking Willpower spends.

facets.name: Impossible Spoor
facets.summary: Adds two successes to every Tracking roll and can spend Essence to ignore an old or degraded trail.

facets.name: Reflected Facets
facets.summary: Spending extra Essence, uses Gifts against prey a packmate senses or transfers self-buffs to a packmate within Cunning miles.

facets.name: Down the Prey
facets.summary: On hitting an enemy a packmate has injured, applies a penalty, a Defense bonus, or the Knockdown Tilt.

facets.name: Totem's Wrath
facets.dicePool: Presence + Occult + Honor vs Power + Finesse + Resistance
facets.summary: Forces the pack totem into a raging materialized shell that fights as a werewolf until its Essence runs out.

facets.name: Maw of Madness
facets.summary: On a damaging bite against a living non-Uratha, inflicts the Moon Taint Condition.

facets.name: Pack Awareness
facets.summary: Permanently senses each packmate's location and wellbeing within Wisdom miles; cannot be surprised by foes they see.

rites.name: Chain Rage
rites.summary: Binds a focus to each participant that forestalls a werewolf's rage until the focus is broken or taken.

rites.name: Messenger
rites.summary: Sends Lunes to deliver a short spoken message instantly to any named werewolf anywhere in the world.

rites.name: Bottle Spirit
rites.action: Extended (5 successes per spirit Rank, 1/10 minutes)
rites.summary: Turns a bottle into a container that draws in and binds the nearest spirit when opened.

rites.name: Sacred Hunt
rites.summary: The Siskur-Dah: binds the pack as hunters of a chosen prey, granting the Siskur-Dah Condition and rights to its Essence.

rites.name: Kindle Fury
rites.summary: Grants all participants the Destroyer Blood archetype, or doubles its Willpower gain if already held.

rites.name: Shadowbind
rites.summary: Confines a spirit within a binding space so it cannot leave, cross the Gauntlet, or use Numina beyond it.

rites.name: Fetish
rites.summary: Binds a spirit into a sacred receptacle to create a fetish.

rites.name: Twilight Purge
rites.summary: Tears all Twilight creatures within 100 yards into the flesh world with the Stunned Tilt, barring re-entry for an hour.

rites.name: Forge Alliance
rites.summary: Joins several packs into one alliance treated as a single pack for most supernatural effects.

rites.name: Veil
rites.summary: Sends spirits to erase all recordings of a recent supernatural event, leaving human memories intact.

rites.name: Urfarah's Bane
rites.summary: Enhances an Uratha's natural weapons to deal aggravated to other werewolves, at the cost of severing her pack-ties.

rites.name: Banish
rites.summary: Casts a targeted spirit or out-of-place creature from one world into its appropriate realm.

rites.name: Harness the Cycle
rites.summary: Draws Essence from the changing seasons, refilling pools and granting humans and Wolf-Blooded healing benefits.

rites.name: Totemic Empowerment
rites.summary: Makes a pack member a vessel for the totem, granting its powers and Essence at the cost of a breaking point.

rites.name: Hunting Ground
rites.summary: Sanctifies the pack's territory, granting bonuses to chases, tracking, and social rolls against its inhabitants.

rites.name: Moon's Mad Love
rites.summary: Invests Luna's presence into humans so they resist and remember through Lunacy, but risk Madness.

rites.name: Wellspring
rites.summary: Amplifies a locus so its Resonance pervades the territory, granting Influence but imposing a Ban on the pack.

rites.name: Raiment of the Storm
rites.summary: During a storm, grants armor, immunity to electricity, and bonuses against supernatural attacks.

rites.name: Shadowcall
rites.summary: Summons a named or nearest desired spirit through ancient law to a prepared summoning spot.

rites.name: Supplication
rites.summary: Offerings improve a spirit type's impression of the pack while imposing a Ban on the ritemaster.

rites.name: Hidden Path
rites.summary: Opens a path between Flesh and Shadow that lets the pack reach a destination in a tenth the normal time.

rites.name: Expel
rites.summary: Lays the pack's claim on a possessed person or object to break a possessing spirit's hold.

rites.name: Great Hunt
rites.summary: Empowers the pack's humans and Wolf-Blooded into Urhan form to hunt the pack's chosen prey.
